member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Auth.Commands.ConfirmPrivateCustomerRegistrationCommand
member.summary: Submits the 6-digit confirmation code sent to the user's email address by Cognito after a successful . On success Cognito fires the Post Confirmation Lambda, which creates the AppUser and UserProfile rows in the database.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Auth.Commands.ConfirmPrivateCustomerRegistrationCommand.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Submits the 6-digit confirmation code sent to the user's email address by Cognito after a successful . On success Cognito fires the Post Confirmation Lambda, which creates the AppUser and UserProfile rows in the database.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Auth.Commands.RegisterPrivateCustomerCommand
member.summary: Initiates Cognito sign-up for a new private customer. Cognito sends a 6-digit confirmation code to ; the client must follow up with .
member.remarks: No invitation token is required for private customers — they can self-register freely. The custom:registration_type attribute is set to private in the Cognito SignUp request so the Pre Sign-up Lambda can distinguish this path from corporate invitation-based registrations.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Auth.Commands.RegisterPrivateCustomerCommand.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initiates Cognito sign-up for a new private customer. Cognito sends a 6-digit confirmation code to ; the client must follow up with .
member.remarks: No invitation token is required for private customers — they can self-register freely. The custom:registration_type attribute is set to private in the Cognito SignUp request so the Pre Sign-up Lambda can distinguish this path from corporate invitation-based registrations.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Auth.Commands.ResendConfirmationCodeCommand
member.summary: Asks Cognito to re-send the confirmation code to the user's email address. Use when the original code has expired (24-hour TTL) or was not received.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Auth.Commands.ResendConfirmationCodeCommand.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Asks Cognito to re-send the confirmation code to the user's email address. Use when the original code has expired (24-hour TTL) or was not received.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Bookings.Commands.ApproveBookingCommand
member.summary: Approves a PendingApproval (InternalStudent) booking. Only SalesStaff and SystemAdmin may send this command; that constraint is enforced by the API authorization policy. The reviewer must not be the same user as the booker. Price is calculated and locked here — the booking transitions to Confirmed.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Bookings.Commands.ApproveBookingCommand.#ctor(System.Guid)
member.summary: Approves a PendingApproval (InternalStudent) booking. Only SalesStaff and SystemAdmin may send this command; that constraint is enforced by the API authorization policy. The reviewer must not be the same user as the booker. Price is calculated and locked here — the booking transitions to Confirmed.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Bookings.Commands.BookingCapacityValidator
member.summary: Enforces the capacity caps defined in CLAUDE.md (FlightDeck ≤ 4, CabinCrew ≤ 10) and the InternalStudent mandatory-field rule (DepartmentName + BudgetCode both required). ICurrentUser is injected so the role-specific rules can be evaluated at request time without embedding role in the command itself.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Bookings.Commands.BookingSlotValidator
member.summary: Enforces the time and duration rules that apply to every simulator booking slot. Registered as a standalone validator so it runs independently via the ValidationBehaviour pipeline before the handler executes.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Bookings.Commands.BookSimulatorSlotCommand
member.summary: Reserves a simulator bay slot and creates a booking in either Provisional (external customers, 15-min hold) or PendingApproval (InternalStudent) state. The Idempotency-Key header value must be passed as so that client retries are safe.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Bookings.Commands.BookSimulatorSlotCommand.#ctor(System.Guid,System.Guid,FSBS.Domain.Enums.TrainingType,System.DateTimeOffset,System.DateTimeOffset,System.Int32,System.Guid,System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Reserves a simulator bay slot and creates a booking in either Provisional (external customers, 15-min hold) or PendingApproval (InternalStudent) state. The Idempotency-Key header value must be passed as so that client retries are safe.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Bookings.Commands.BookSimulatorSlotCommandValidator
member.summary: Validates the structural fields of the command (non-empty IDs). Time/duration rules live in ; capacity and role rules live in . All three are discovered by assembly scanning and run independently by the ValidationBehaviour pipeline.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Bookings.Commands.BookSimulatorSlotResult
member.param: The newly created (or previously created idempotent) booking.
Provisional for external customers — the slot is held for 15 minutes pending explicit confirmation. PendingApproval for InternalStudents — slot is held indefinitely until SalesStaff acts.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Bookings.Commands.BookSimulatorSlotResult.#ctor(System.Guid,FSBS.Domain.Enums.BookingStatus)
member.param: The newly created (or previously created idempotent) booking.
Provisional for external customers — the slot is held for 15 minutes pending explicit confirmation. PendingApproval for InternalStudents — slot is held indefinitely until SalesStaff acts.

member.name: P:FSBS.Application.Bookings.Commands.BookSimulatorSlotResult.BookingId
member.summary: The newly created (or previously created idempotent) booking.

member.name: P:FSBS.Application.Bookings.Commands.BookSimulatorSlotResult.Status
member.summary: Provisional for external customers — the slot is held for 15 minutes pending explicit confirmation. PendingApproval for InternalStudents — slot is held indefinitely until SalesStaff acts.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Bookings.Commands.CancelBookingCommand
member.summary: Cancels a booking. The resulting status — CancelledByCustomer or CancelledByAdmin — is determined at runtime from ICurrentUser: if the caller is the booker (or a corporate manager acting for their org) the booking is marked CancelledByCustomer; staff roles produce CancelledByAdmin. An optional reason may be supplied in either case.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Bookings.Commands.CancelBookingCommand.#ctor(System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Cancels a booking. The resulting status — CancelledByCustomer or CancelledByAdmin — is determined at runtime from ICurrentUser: if the caller is the booker (or a corporate manager acting for their org) the booking is marked CancelledByCustomer; staff roles produce CancelledByAdmin. An optional reason may be supplied in either case.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Bookings.Commands.RejectBookingCommand
member.summary: Rejects a PendingApproval (InternalStudent) booking. Only SalesStaff and SystemAdmin may send this command; that constraint is enforced by the API authorization policy. The reviewer must not be the same user as the booker. All reserved slots are released and orphaned reconfiguration slots are removed.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Bookings.Commands.RejectBookingCommand.#ctor(System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Rejects a PendingApproval (InternalStudent) booking. Only SalesStaff and SystemAdmin may send this command; that constraint is enforced by the API authorization policy. The reviewer must not be the same user as the booker. All reserved slots are released and orphaned reconfiguration slots are removed.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Bookings.Services.IReconfigurationService.BuildSlotForConfirmedBookingAsync(FSBS.Domain.Entities.Booking,FSBS.Domain.Entities.BookingSlot,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Builds the reconfiguration slot to be inserted immediately after a booking is confirmed. Returns null only when the immediately following booking on the same bay uses the same configuration (no turnaround required). In all other cases a slot is always returned — either transitioning to the next booking's config, or returning to the unit's active config for operational readiness when no following booking exists.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Bookings.Services.IReconfigurationService.RemoveOrphanedSlotsAsync(FSBS.Domain.Entities.Booking,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Removes the reconfiguration slot attached to a cancelled or rejected booking, then re-evaluates the preceding booking's reconfig slot in case it now needs to point at a different following configuration.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Common.Behaviours.LoggingBehaviour`2
member.summary: First pipeline behaviour. Logs the request name on entry and exit so that every command and query appears in structured logs without handler code needing to repeat the boilerplate.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Common.Behaviours.LoggingBehaviour`2.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{FSBS.Application.Common.Behaviours.LoggingBehaviour{`0,`1}})
member.summary: First pipeline behaviour. Logs the request name on entry and exit so that every command and query appears in structured logs without handler code needing to repeat the boilerplate.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Common.Behaviours.TransactionBehaviour`2
member.summary: Third pipeline behaviour. Applies only to ICommand requests. After the handler executes it collects domain events from tracked aggregate roots, flushes changes to the database via IUnitOfWork, then dispatches the events so that side-effects (emails, cache invalidation, SignalR pushes) run after the commit succeeds.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Common.Behaviours.TransactionBehaviour`2.#ctor(FSBS.Domain.Interfaces.IUnitOfWork,FSBS.Domain.Interfaces.IDomainEventDispatcher,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{FSBS.Application.Common.Behaviours.TransactionBehaviour{`0,`1}})
member.summary: Third pipeline behaviour. Applies only to ICommand requests. After the handler executes it collects domain events from tracked aggregate roots, flushes changes to the database via IUnitOfWork, then dispatches the events so that side-effects (emails, cache invalidation, SignalR pushes) run after the commit succeeds.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Common.Behaviours.ValidationBehaviour`2
member.summary: Second pipeline behaviour. Runs all instances registered for and throws a if any rules fail. Handlers only execute when the request is fully valid.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Common.Behaviours.ValidationBehaviour`2.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{FluentValidation.IValidator{`0}})
member.summary: Second pipeline behaviour. Runs all instances registered for and throws a if any rules fail. Handlers only execute when the request is fully valid.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Common.Events.DomainEventNotification`1
member.summary: Wraps a domain event in a MediatR INotification so that application-layer handlers can subscribe to specific event types via INotificationHandler<DomainEventNotification<TEvent>>.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Common.Events.DomainEventNotification`1.#ctor(`0)
member.summary: Wraps a domain event in a MediatR INotification so that application-layer handlers can subscribe to specific event types via INotificationHandler<DomainEventNotification<TEvent>>.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Common.Exceptions.ConfirmationCodeExpiredException
member.summary: Raised when the confirmation code submitted to Cognito has passed its TTL (24 hours by default). Maps to HTTP 400 Bad Request. The client should direct the user to request a new code via the resend endpoint.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Common.Exceptions.ConfirmationCodeExpiredException.#ctor
member.summary: Raised when the confirmation code submitted to Cognito has passed its TTL (24 hours by default). Maps to HTTP 400 Bad Request. The client should direct the user to request a new code via the resend endpoint.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Common.Exceptions.InvalidConfirmationCodeException
member.summary: Raised when the confirmation code submitted to Cognito does not match the code that was issued. Maps to HTTP 400 Bad Request.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Common.Exceptions.InvalidConfirmationCodeException.#ctor
member.summary: Raised when the confirmation code submitted to Cognito does not match the code that was issued. Maps to HTTP 400 Bad Request.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Common.Exceptions.RegistrationEmailAlreadyExistsException
member.summary: Raised when a Cognito sign-up is attempted with an email address that is already registered in the customer pool. Maps to HTTP 409 Conflict.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Common.Exceptions.RegistrationEmailAlreadyExistsException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Raised when a Cognito sign-up is attempted with an email address that is already registered in the customer pool. Maps to HTTP 409 Conflict.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Common.Exceptions.SelfApprovalException
member.summary: Thrown when the user attempting to approve a booking is the same user who created it. Enforced here and reinforced by the DB CHECK constraint on booking_approvals.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Common.Exceptions.SelfApprovalException.#ctor(System.Guid)
member.summary: Thrown when the user attempting to approve a booking is the same user who created it. Enforced here and reinforced by the DB CHECK constraint on booking_approvals.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Common.Interfaces.IAvailabilityCache
member.summary: Redis-backed cache for the simulator availability grid. TTL is 60 seconds. Every booking mutation must call so the next read rebuilds from the DB.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Common.Interfaces.IAvailabilityCache.GetAsync(System.Guid,System.DateTimeOffset,System.DateTimeOffset,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the cached availability grid for the given simulator and date range, or null if the cache entry has expired or does not exist.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Common.Interfaces.IAvailabilityCache.SetAsync(System.Guid,System.DateTimeOffset,System.DateTimeOffset,FSBS.Application.Simulators.Queries.AvailabilityGridDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Stores the availability grid in Redis with a 60-second TTL.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Common.Interfaces.IAvailabilityCache.InvalidateAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Removes all cache entries for the given simulator. Called on every booking create, modify, or cancel so the next read is fresh.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Common.Interfaces.IAvailabilityReadService
member.summary: Dapper-based read service that executes the complex availability query bypassing EF Core. Returns the full slot grid in a single round-trip.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Common.Interfaces.IAvailabilityReadService.GetAvailabilityAsync(System.Guid,System.DateTimeOffset,System.DateTimeOffset,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the availability grid for the given simulator and date range, including available slots, reconfiguration windows, and maintenance windows.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Common.Interfaces.ICognitoService
member.summary: Abstracts AWS Cognito Identity Provider operations so that handlers in the Application layer remain decoupled from the AWS SDK.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Common.Interfaces.ICognitoService.SignUpPrivateCustomerAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Initiates Cognito sign-up for a private customer. Cognito will send a confirmation code to ; the user must then call to complete registration.
member.exception: Thrown when an account with already exists in the pool.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Common.Interfaces.ICognitoService.ConfirmSignUpAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Confirms a Cognito sign-up using the 6-digit code sent to the user's email. On success Cognito fires the Post Confirmation Lambda, which creates the AppUser and UserProfile rows in the database.
member.exception: Thrown when the code does not match.
Thrown when the code has expired (default TTL: 24 hours).

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Common.Interfaces.ICognitoService.ResendConfirmationCodeAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asks Cognito to re-send the confirmation code to . Use this when the original code has expired or was not received.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Common.Interfaces.ICommand`1
member.summary: Marker interface for commands. TransactionBehaviour constrains itself to ICommand so that read-only queries are never wrapped in a DB transaction.

member.name: P:FSBS.Application.Common.Interfaces.ICurrentUser.OrgId
member.summary: The organisation the current user belongs to. Populated only for CorporateManager and CorporateStudent tokens that carry an org_id claim. Null for staff users and unauthenticated requests.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Common.Interfaces.IS3Service
member.summary: Generates pre-signed URLs for the private documents S3 bucket. The bucket is never served through CloudFront — all access is via time-limited signed URLs only.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Common.Interfaces.IS3Service.GeneratePresignedGetUrlAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a pre-signed GET URL for the given object key that expires after minutes.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Common.Interfaces.IS3Service.GeneratePresignedPutUrlAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a pre-signed PUT URL allowing a client to upload directly to S3 without routing the binary through the API.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Common.Interfaces.ISesEmailService
member.summary: Sends transactional emails via Amazon SES using pre-registered templates.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Common.Interfaces.ISesEmailService.SendTemplatedEmailAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Object,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a templated email to a single recipient.
member.param: SES template name registered in the account.
Object serialised to JSON and merged into the template.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Common.Interfaces.ISesEmailService.SendEmailAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a plain-text / HTML email without a pre-registered template. Used for ad-hoc operational messages.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Common.Interfaces.ISqsPublisher
member.summary: Publishes domain event envelopes to an Amazon SQS queue for async processing by the notification worker.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Common.Interfaces.ISqsPublisher.PublishAsync``1(``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Serialises as JSON and sends it to the configured queue. The message type name is included as a message attribute so the worker can dispatch without deserialising the body.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Common.Services.MediatRDomainEventDispatcher
member.summary: Dispatches domain events via MediatR by wrapping each event in a DomainEventNotification so that handlers can subscribe per concrete type.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Common.Services.MediatRDomainEventDispatcher.#ctor(MediatR.IPublisher)
member.summary: Dispatches domain events via MediatR by wrapping each event in a DomainEventNotification so that handlers can subscribe per concrete type.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Invitations.Commands.ClaimInvitationCommand
member.summary: Creates an account for an invited corporate user (CorporateManager or CorporateStudent) and marks the invitation as Claimed in a single atomic operation. The caller's role and organisation are derived from the invitation record — never trusted from the request body.
member.remarks: In production this command is superseded by the Cognito Post-Confirmation Lambda, which performs the same DB operations after the user confirms their email via the hosted UI. In the dev environment (DevAuth:Enabled = true) there is no Cognito or Lambda, so this command handles the full registration.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Invitations.Commands.ClaimInvitationCommand.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates an account for an invited corporate user (CorporateManager or CorporateStudent) and marks the invitation as Claimed in a single atomic operation. The caller's role and organisation are derived from the invitation record — never trusted from the request body.
member.remarks: In production this command is superseded by the Cognito Post-Confirmation Lambda, which performs the same DB operations after the user confirms their email via the hosted UI. In the dev environment (DevAuth:Enabled = true) there is no Cognito or Lambda, so this command handles the full registration.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Invitations.Commands.CreateCorporateManagerInvitationCommand
member.summary: Issued by SalesStaff to invite a new CorporateManager to the platform. The handler generates a cryptographically random token, stores only its SHA-256 hash, and creates a Pending invitation record.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Invitations.Commands.CreateCorporateManagerInvitationCommand.#ctor(System.String,System.Guid)
member.summary: Issued by SalesStaff to invite a new CorporateManager to the platform. The handler generates a cryptographically random token, stores only its SHA-256 hash, and creates a Pending invitation record.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Invitations.Commands.InviteCorporateStudentCommand
member.summary: Issued by a CorporateManager to invite a new CorporateStudent into their own organisation. The handler derives the OrgId from the caller's JWT rather than accepting it from the client, preventing cross-org invitation forgery.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Invitations.Commands.InviteCorporateStudentCommand.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Issued by a CorporateManager to invite a new CorporateStudent into their own organisation. The handler derives the OrgId from the caller's JWT rather than accepting it from the client, preventing cross-org invitation forgery.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Invitations.Queries.ValidateInvitationTokenQuery
member.summary: Validates a raw invitation token before showing the registration form. Returns a safe result (IsValid = false) for any invalid, expired, or already-claimed token — never reveals which specific condition applies.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Invitations.Queries.ValidateInvitationTokenQuery.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Validates a raw invitation token before showing the registration form. Returns a safe result (IsValid = false) for any invalid, expired, or already-claimed token — never reveals which specific condition applies.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Pricing.Services.AppliedDiscount
member.summary: A single discount rule that was evaluated as eligible and contributed to the final price. One AppliedDiscount maps to one BookingDiscount snapshot written at confirmation.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Pricing.Services.AppliedDiscount.#ctor(System.Guid,FSBS.Domain.Enums.DiscountType,System.Decimal,FSBS.Domain.ValueObjects.Money)
member.summary: A single discount rule that was evaluated as eligible and contributed to the final price. One AppliedDiscount maps to one BookingDiscount snapshot written at confirmation.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Pricing.Services.IPricingService.CalculateAsync(FSBS.Application.Pricing.Services.PricingRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Calculates the gross price, applicable discounts, and net price for a booking at the point of confirmation. The result is locked immediately after this call — never recalculated.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Pricing.Services.PricingRequest
member.summary: Input to the pricing engine. Supplied by the booking command handler at the point of slot confirmation.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Pricing.Services.PricingRequest.#ctor(System.Guid,FSBS.Domain.Enums.TrainingType,FSBS.Domain.Enums.CustomerClass,FSBS.Domain.Enums.AppRole,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.DateTimeOffset,System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.Int32)
member.summary: Input to the pricing engine. Supplied by the booking command handler at the point of slot confirmation.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Pricing.Services.PricingResult
member.summary: The fully calculated price for a booking, ready to be locked at confirmation. GrossPrice − DiscountAmount = NetPrice.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Pricing.Services.PricingResult.#ctor(FSBS.Domain.ValueObjects.Money,FSBS.Domain.ValueObjects.Money,FSBS.Domain.ValueObjects.Money,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{FSBS.Application.Pricing.Services.AppliedDiscount})
member.summary: The fully calculated price for a booking, ready to be locked at confirmation. GrossPrice − DiscountAmount = NetPrice.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Simulators.Queries.AvailableSlotDto
member.summary: Represents a single available booking slot on a simulator bay.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Simulators.Queries.AvailableSlotDto.#ctor(System.Guid,System.DateTimeOffset,System.DateTimeOffset,System.Int32)
member.summary: Represents a single available booking slot on a simulator bay.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Simulators.Queries.ReconfigurationWindowDto
member.summary: Represents a non-bookable reconfiguration window between two sessions. Rendered as hatched grey on the availability calendar.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Simulators.Queries.ReconfigurationWindowDto.#ctor(System.Guid,System.DateTimeOffset,System.DateTimeOffset,System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Represents a non-bookable reconfiguration window between two sessions. Rendered as hatched grey on the availability calendar.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Simulators.Queries.MaintenanceWindowDto
member.summary: Represents a maintenance window during which the simulator is unavailable.

member.name: M:FSBS.Application.Simulators.Queries.MaintenanceWindowDto.#ctor(System.Guid,System.DateTimeOffset,System.DateTimeOffset,System.String)
member.summary: Represents a maintenance window during which the simulator is unavailable.

member.name: T:FSBS.Application.Simulators.Queries.AvailabilityGridDto
member.summary: Full availability grid returned by GET /simulators/{id}/availability. Cached in Redis for 60 seconds; invalidated on every booking mutation.
Full availability grid returned by GET /simulators/{id}/availability. Cached in Redis for 60 seconds; invalidated on every booking mutation.
